channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pallet dumped by bike hangar, 1st May
item.description:
Pallet left by bike hangar

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sportsbank Street, Catford South, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised concrete, 1st May
item.description:
There is a raised concrete joint going across pavement outside no 6 Beaconsfield Rd BR1 2BP which is a serious trip hazard. Also the hedge is rather over hanging the pavement restricting the pavement width.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bikes, 1st May
item.description:
Seems it is becoming a trend 🙊🙈🙉

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 74, Tunnel Avenue, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of over hanging branches, 1st May
item.description:
The trees & bushes need cutting back. Some are quite low. The whole area needs a general tidy up from Beaconsfield Road down to Page Heath Lane.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clarence Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black Bin bags dumped in the street. Address included., 1st May
item.description:
Binbags flytipped. The bin bags contained an address pictured within.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tarver Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: CATV manhole cover raised, 1st May
item.description:
Yesterday 30th April CATV works were going on at this spot.. Manhole was up and men working on it.. Today on my walk I stepped onto the cover and it wobbled precariously.. It's very dangerously raised high as it hasn't been replaced properly. Needs attention.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Normanhurst Avenue, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old wardrobe and furniture, 1st May
item.description:
Large pieces of a wardrobe and glass table top.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Roll Way, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Original Tree was damaged, 1st May
item.description:
Tree was damaged & removed. Please can a new tree be planted.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water seeping through drain cover, 1st May
item.description:
This has been an issue for a few months. Despite Thames water attending at least twice the water is still leaking & running on pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Houshold items dumped outside my building on the pavement, 1st May
item.description:
The rubbish has been dumped outside 9 - 16 Sandford Court N16. The items are household items from number 12 they moved out and the flat has been worked on. They firstly put the items in the back at our bins and today they have been placed on the pavemen!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bethune Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken cracked paving slaps, 1st May
item.description:
Heavy delivery Lorrie’s going onto the pavement between house number 10/8 have damaged a section of paving slabs. Some are cracked some are actually sticking up in the air. Very serious trip hazard. Happened a couple of weeks ago.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Branch needs clearing properly, 1st May
item.description:
This branch has been cut and left, but the cut ends are far too close/overhanging the path. It’s dangerous.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crofton Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle not moved for months, 1st May
item.description:
This vehicle has been parked for months and not moved

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sprules Road, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 29, 1st May
item.description:
2x chest of drawers, baby high chair, wooden planks. Has been there for a few days.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mowbray Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Tree outside 106 Belmont Lane been hit by bus, 1st May
item.description:
The tree would appear to need pruning. On Saturday the 25th April it would appear the tree has been hit by a bus or large vehicle. A number of large branches were displaced and left on the green and in the kerb, it could have been a safety issue for anyone walking on the path. We have moved the branches to the open space area past 116 Belmont Lane, so as to avoid further problems. We have reported this issue in the past, and no action apparently was needed. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 81, Belmont Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped some woods for a week, 1st May
item.description:
Need to be collected

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farmers Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Along street Farmers road need to be swipe and removed tweeds, 1st May
item.description:
Has not been swiped for a months, Front of special school, both sides of road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farmers Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
